name: Grape Apple Pops
recipeIngredient: 23 oz Jar MOTT'S Chunky Apple Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the frozen grape juice concentrate and apple sauce; blend well.
2. Fill each cup with about 1/3 cup of the juice mixture.
3. Place the cups in the freezer until they are partially frozen, about 1 hour.
4. Insert the wooden sticks into each cup.
5. Freeze the cups until firm, about 2 hours.
6. To serve, remove the drink cups. Makes 9 pops.
